title: No More Combat Logging
description: This mod bans people for leaving in a pvp.
body:
This minecraft mod adds a simple timer to the game when someone hits another person, or they get hit. If any of the 2 people leave while that timer is running, they will be banned. This helps prevent unfair pvp's.

**Lost the code files, later updates have been cancelled.
Im making a new mod tho! Supposed to boost fps... hopefully goes to plan!**
